rest_integration_profile.description: Alma integrates with external systems such as vendor systems, Enterprise Resource Planning systems, catalog systems, remote storage systems, etc. using standard protocols. Integration profiles define the way an integration is being performed.

id.description: Integration profile ID. This ID can be used in order to find the corresponding job ID. For more information see [Working with the Alma Jobs API](https://developers.exlibrisgroup.com/blog/Working-with-the-Alma-Jobs-API).

type.description: The integration profile type. Possible codes are listed in 'IntegrationTypes' [code table](https://developers.exlibrisgroup.com/blog/Working-with-the-code-tables-API). This field cannot be updated.

system.description: The system with which you are integrating (for informational purposes).mandatory. Possible codes are listed in 'ExternalSystemTypes' [code table](https://developers.exlibrisgroup.com/blog/Working-with-the-code-tables-API).

ftp_connection.description: S/FTP connection to transfer files between Alma and the external system.

default.description: Indication whether the profile is a default profile. Default is false.

description.example: Agresso is our system for users

parameter.description: List of the profile's related parameters. These parameters are parallel to the fields in the Actions tab of the integration profile in Alma UI.

parameters.description: List of the profile's related parameters. These parameters are parallel to the fields in the Actions tab of the integration profile in Alma UI.

action.description: The name of the action the specific parameter is related to.
